questions.question: What is the primary purpose of Erosion in Morphological Image Processing?
options: C) To remove noise and small objects
questions.explanation: Erosion is used to remove noise and small objects from an image.

questions.question: What is the effect of Dilation on an image?
options: A) To remove noise and small objects
questions.explanation: Dilation is used to enlarge objects in an image.

questions.question: What is the difference between Opening and Closing operations?
options: A) Opening removes noise and small objects while Closing enlarges objects
B) Opening enlarges objects while Closing removes noise
C) Opening and Closing are same operations
D) Opening and Closing are inverses of each other
questions.explanation: Opening removes noise and small objects, while Closing removes large objects and noise.

questions.question: What is the role of Hit-or-Miss operation in Morphological Image Processing?
options: A) To apply a defined shape to the image
B) To remove noise and small objects
questions.explanation: Hit-or-Miss operation is used to apply a defined shape to the image.

questions.question: What is the effect of Iterated Erosion and Dilation on an image?
options: A) To remove noise and small objects
questions.explanation: Iterated Erosion and Dilation are used to remove noise and small objects from an image.
